_note: Single source of truth for The Bitcoin Spiral / Mandala design system. To rebrand (e.g. to match yubhub.co), edit the values here, then mirror them into: generate.py (the T dict), dashboard.html (:root CSS vars) and design/make_og.py. See design/README.md.

font.family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
